workshoptitle: How-To: LiveLabs AI Playground Skills With Codex

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the LiveLabs AI Playground workshop for screenshot capture and quiz-based gamification with Codex.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Take Screenshots in Minutes
tutorials.description: Learn how to use Codex to walk a lab, capture screenshots, annotate images, blur sensitive information, and keep workshop assets aligned with placeholder references.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Generate Quizzes in Minutes
tutorials.description: Learn how to use the livelabs-gamification skill to choose the right quiz mode, prompt Codex clearly, and validate quiz-based checks for a LiveLabs workshop.
